28.reason: [Push is executed even when the stack is full, leading to buffer overflow. The function call should be inside an else block.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.2 , reason:  [Push is executed even when the stack is full, leading to buffer overflow. The function call should be inside an else block.]

37.reason: [Pop is executed even when the stack is empty, which leads to undefined behavior (accessing invalid memory). The pop and print should only occur if the stack is not empty.]

38.reason: [This prints the return value of pop even when the stack was empty, which may print garbage or cause runtime errors.]

49.reason: [No check for stack full condition inside push; relies on caller, but caller already printed "error" and still calls push, causing overflow.]

56.reason: [No check for empty stack inside pop; if called when empty, accesses invalid index (top = -1), leading to undefined behavior.]
